title: The Flash CW Season 1 Core
description: Project mod that recreates the universe of the CW Flash series with all the heroes and villains.
body:
# The Flash Season 1 Core

![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.6-green) ![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-blue) ![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-In_Development-orange)

**The Flash Season 1 Core** is a Minecraft mod project that aims to faithfully recreate the universe of The CW's *The Flash* series. Step into the boots of the Scarlet Speedster or his greatest enemies and harness the power of the Speed Force.

## Current Features

### Heroes & Villains
* **The Flash** (Barry Allen)
  * **Ability 1 :** Speed Level
  * **Ability 2 :** Slow Motion
  * **Ability 3 :** Phase
  * **Passif 1 :** Running on water
  * **Passif 2 :** Supersonic hit
* **The Reverse-Flash** (Eobard Thawne)
  * **Ability 1 :** Speed Level
  * **Ability 2 :** Slow Motion
  * **Ability 3 :** Phase
  * **Passif 1 :** Running on water
  * **Passif 2 :** Supersonic hit
* **Kyle Nimbus** (The Mist)
  * **Ability 1 :** Sublimation
* **Clyde Mardon** (Weather Control)
  * **Ability 1 :** Wheather Control
  * **Ability 2 :** Smoke
* **Mark Mardon** (Weather Wizard)
    * **Ability 1 :** Wheather Control
    * **Ability 2 :** Lightning Bolt
    * **Ability 3 :** Throw Ice Ball
* **Shawna Baez** (Peek-a-Boo)
  * **Ability 1 :** Teleportation
* **Rainbow Raider** (Emotion Manipulation)
  * **Ability 1 :** Rainbow raider effect (The player affects the attacking entity when it is within range.)
* **Jake Simmons** (Deathbolt)
  * **Ability 1 :** Plasma Eyes
* **Plastique** (Bette Sans Souci)
  * **Ability 1 :** Magic Touch
* **Tony Woodward** (Girder)
  * **Passif 1 :** Increase attack damage & resistance
* **Captain Cold** (Leonard Snart)
  * **Item**
* **Heat Wave** (Mick Rory)
  * **Item**
* **Golden Glider** (Lisa Snart)
  * **Item**
* **Hartley Rathaway** (Pied Piper)
  * **Item**

### Commands
* `/power give [power]`
  * **Abilities** : Your abilities will be displayed in the chat when the power is granted to you.
* `/power create [power] [parameters]`
  * **Speed Force** : Create your own **Speed Force** by changing the color of your lightning, maximum speed, and visual effects.

### Abilities
The mod introduces power system controllable via keybinds and mouse scrolling or passive. 

* **Key Type :**
    * Type the **Ability Key** to activate the power.
* **Key + SCROLL :**
    * **Control:** Hold the designated **Ability Key** and use the **Mouse Scroll Wheel** to adjust.

---
## Roadmap & Future Updates

The goal is to implement the entire roster of metahumans and rogues from Season 1 of the TV show.

### Upcoming Characters (Season 1)
We are working on implementing the following characters with their unique abilities:

* **Danton Black** (Multiplex)
* **Farooq Gibran** (Blackout)
* **Firestorm** (Ronnie Raymond & Martin Stein)
* **Hannibal Bates** (Everyman)

## Installation

1.  Install 1.20.6 version of the **Fabric Loader**.
2. Download the **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.100.8+1.20.6)** mod and place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Download **The Flash Season 1 Core** `.jar` file and place it in your `mods` folder.
4. Launch the game and run !

---
